arts.ttl: Inside the Shrewsbury Town camp on New Year's Eve in Blackpool
arts.sum: Salop stayed in a hotel in Blackpool on the final day of 2024 as they prepared for their League One match against the Seasiders on New Year's Day - which they drew 1-1 thanks to Tom Bloxham's goal late in the second half. I'm sorry I let the whole world of rock and roll down last night.
